content:
This WhatsApp message received on-3/07/2026 anyone who told belong to Insurance Samadhan for empanelment in siwan with his company and shown she belongs to Advocate 
but after calling or message she not lifted or reply about...i told if you are adv
than why not lift call or reply....and how u directly got my number....??
when I talked to ours Bar Secretary about 
for any insurance given by Bar he denied.
and no any circular about same....
hello also called his number but no reply.
in this type of scam going by using imporsonation by anyone using name Ad

FYI....
